sectiondef.header: Definition of asserts if macro is defined

briefdescription.para: < All asserts are under XSECDEBUG macro now
To set the core into reset.
To take the core out of reset.
Writes data to 32-bit address and checks for blind writes.

parameterdescription.para: Contains the base address of the device
Contains the offset from the base address of the device

listitem.para: The value read from the register

parameterdescription.para: Contains the base address of the device
Contains the offset from the base address of the device
Is the value to be written to the register

briefdescription.para: This function reads data from 64-bit address.

listitem.para: The value read from the provided address

briefdescription.para: This function reads a byte from 64-bit address.

listitem.para: The value read from the provided address

briefdescription.para: This function writes data to 64-bit address.

parameterdescription.para: is the value to be written

briefdescription.para: This function writes 32 bit data to 64-bit address.

parameterdescription.para: is the value to be written

briefdescription.para: This function writes a byte to a 64-bit address.

parameterdescription.para: is the value to be written

briefdescription.para: This function places the hardware core into the reset.

listitem.para: Clear bit when crypto is not in use

briefdescription.para: This function takes the hardware core out of reset.

listitem.para: Set bit when crypto is in use

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.1 kpt 01/13/23 Initial Release 5.1 yog 05/03/23 Fixed MISRA C violation of Rule 2.5 5.4 kpt 06/24/24 Added XSECURE_BYTE_IN_BITS pre 08/16/24 Added XSecure_MemCpy64 macro 5.7 tvp 02/19/26 Added XSECURE_VALUE_ONE/TWO/THREE tvp 02/19/26 Added XSECURE_ALLFS and XSECURE_ZERO
